authority: CIS-EX-008 proposed protocol; not authorized for collection

scope.population: population pending methods and accessibility review
scope.task: bounded target-operation discovery and recovery task

prohibited_interpretations: Instrument events do not directly reveal awareness, understanding, intention, trust, or strategy.
observation_model: Versioned host instrumentation records projection, participant input, system result, state transition, feedback, and monotonic time; participant reports are separate records.
detection_rules: Accept only records whose payload schema, instrument version, episode identity, and monotonic time resolve.
Retain duplicate, late, and malformed records with an explicit invalid status.
event_coding_rules: Code selection from a resolved participant input record.
Code execution only from a committed transition.
Code success only from a verified terminal state and frozen completion predicate.
segmentation_rules: Start an episode at the first valid projection.ready event for the assigned condition.
End at the first valid task.complete, task.abandon, invalidity, or timeout event.
Retain late and duplicate records with invalid status rather than silently deleting them.
attribution_rules: Attribute an input only when its participant, episode, projection, and instrument identifiers resolve.
Code execution only from a committed system transition record.
Code success only when the explicit completion criterion resolves true.
ordering_rule: Order by monotonic instrument time, then frozen source sequence; unresolved ties remain unknown for order-dependent measures.

missingness_rules.missing_required_record: mark the affected event or measure missing_unknown
missingness_rules.invalid_record: retain for audit and exclude only under the frozen rule
missingness_rules.absence_of_event: encode observed absence only when the full observation window is valid

falsifying_evidence: Independent recoding does not reproduce primary event labels within the frozen tolerance.
Required event identity or ordering cannot be resolved.
Condition assignment and recorded projection version disagree.
claim_limits: Non-selection cannot be coded as non-awareness.
A trace cannot be labeled a strategy.
Condition differences do not identify a universal perceptual mechanism.

review_requirements.technical: verify identity resolution, ordering, replay, and condition assignment
review_requirements.human: independent review of ambiguous coding and primary-claim boundary before release

evidence_lineage_rule: Every coded event names its source records and rule version; every derived measure names its coded events, contract, estimator, and software version.

provenance_requirements.raw: append-only source identifier, instrument version, recorded time, and payload schema
provenance_requirements.coded: coder or deterministic rule version, input record references, adjudication status, and transformation time
provenance_requirements.derived: contract, estimator, code, and environment versions
